files./about.php:
Our Story

Born from a love of good coffee

Since 2012

A small roastery with big dreams

What started as a single roaster in a converted garage has grown into a beloved neighborhood institution. We source our beans directly from small farms across Ethiopia, Colombia, and Guatemala—paying fair prices and building lasting relationships.

Every bean is roasted in small batches, every drink is poured with care, and every guest is treated like family. That’s our promise.

What we stand for

message:
I've built a beautiful 2-page coffee shop landing page in PHP with Home and About pages. The design uses Tailwind CSS via CDN with a warm, rich coffee aesthetic featuring elegant typography (Playfair Display + Inter), amber/brown color palette, hero sections, and a shared header/footer component.

*QA Audit: QA Review complete.*
reasoning:
Builder: User requested PHP mode with 2 pages (Home + About). I created a shared header/footer partial for DRY code, plus index.php and about.php. Used Tailwind via CDN since PHP doesn't have a build step, and Google Fonts for premium typography. Kept it to 4 files total to respect incremental build rules.
QA: Reviewed all four files. The PHP includes use relative paths ('partials/header.php' and 'partials/footer.php') which work correctly when index.php and about.php are in the root. The $pageTitle variable is properly set before the header include and accessed safely with null coalescing. The $currentPage logic in header.php correctly highlights active nav links. All foreach loops are properly closed, all PHP tags are balanced, and HTML structure (DOCTYPE in header, closing body/html in footer) is intact. Tailwind CDN and Google Fonts are properly linked. No hallucinated variables, no syntax errors, no missing imports. Image URLs from Unsplash are valid format. Code is production-ready.

structuredResponse.task: Build 2-page coffee shop landing page in PHP
structuredResponse.plan: Create shared header/footer partials and two PHP pages (home, about) with Tailwind CDN styling
structuredResponse.changesMade: Created PHP coffee shop site with Home (hero, featured drinks, testimonial) and About (story, values, team) pages. Shared header with navigation and footer for DRY structure. Modern warm aesthetic with amber/stone palette.
structuredResponse.nextStep: Preview the site. Optionally add a Menu page, contact form, or replace placeholder images with real coffee shop photography.

routing.reason: Fallback router used due to parsing failure
